anchor: Who are the suppliers that have been late with their deliveries in the past quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Records purchase transactions made to suppliers. Used to identify suppliers with delayed deliveries.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Links each purchase order to a specific supplier. Used to identify the supplier who has delayed deliveries.
[FIELD] delivery_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the expected delivery date. Used to identify the orders that were supposed to be delivered in the past quarter.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Indicates the current status of the purchase order. Filtered to 'Delayed' to identify late deliveries.

anchor: What items are running low in the main warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to answer real-time inventory balance and on-hand stock questions.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product being queried. Used to identify items in the warehouse.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. This field directly answers how much stock is currently available.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to 'Main Warehouse' to identify items in the main warehouse.

anchor: What are the best-selling items in the last 3 months?

[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Represents the quantity sold per item. Summed to calculate total units sold.
[TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Stores sales transaction headers including invoice date and customer information. Used to filter sales by time period such as the last 3 months.

anchor: What's the total value of items we rejected this month?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | desc: Records receipt of purchased items. Used to identify rejected items.
[FIELD] rejected_qty | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | desc: Represents the quantity of items rejected. Multiplied with item price to calculate total value of rejected items.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | desc: Represents the receipt date. Filtered to restrict results to this month.

anchor: Which items are at risk of stockout in the next month?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify items with low stock.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to identify items with low stock.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Compared with projected demand to identify stockout risk.

anchor: What's the total value of dead stock across all our locations?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify dead stock.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to identify dead stock items.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Multiplied with item price to calculate total value of dead stock.

anchor: Which items have been frequently bought together?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Contains individual line items for each sales invoice. Used to identify items bought together.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Links each item row to its parent sales invoice. Used to group items bought together.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Identifies the product sold. Used to identify items bought together.

anchor: What's the average time from order to delivery?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Records sales transactions made to customers. Used to calculate order to delivery time.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Represents the order date. Used to calculate order to delivery time.
[TABLE] tabDelivery Note | desc: Records delivery of sold items to customers. Used to calculate order to delivery time.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabDelivery Note | desc: Represents the delivery date. Used to calculate order to delivery time.

anchor: Which products are running low in our main store?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to check inventory levels.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list products with low stock.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to check if stock is below a certain threshold.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to match 'main store'.

anchor: Who's been the slowest supplier in the past quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Records purchase transactions made to suppliers. Used to calculate delivery times.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Links each purchase order to a specific supplier. Used to identify the supplier with slowest delivery.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the date of the purchase order. Filtered to match the past quarter time range.
[FIELD] schedule_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the expected delivery date. Used to calculate delivery delay.
[TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Master data table containing supplier details. Joined to display readable supplier names.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Primary supplier identifier used for display.

anchor: What's the total value of goods returned this week?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Records details of returned sales items. Used to calculate total value of returns.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Represents the date of the sales return. Filtered to match 'this week'.
[FIELD] grand_total | [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Stores the monetary value of each sales return. Summed to determine total value of returns.

anchor: Which items have we overstocked in any warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify overstocked items.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list overstocked items.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to check if stock exceeds a certain threshold.

anchor: What's the stock worth for each product in the finished goods store?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to calculate stock value.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list products in the 'finished goods store'.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Multiplied with item rate to calculate stock value.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to match 'finished goods store'.
[TABLE] tabItem | desc: Master data table containing item details. Joined to get item rate.
[FIELD] standard_rate | [TABLE] tabItem | desc: Represents the standard selling price of the item. Used to calculate stock value.

anchor: Which items are frequently out of stock?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify frequently out of stock items.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list items that frequently go out of stock.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to check if stock is frequently zero.

anchor: What's the total value of goods in transit?
positives: [TABLE] tabDelivery Note | desc: Records details of goods dispatched but not yet delivered. Used to calculate total value of goods in transit.
[FIELD] docstatus | [TABLE] tabDelivery Note | desc: Represents the document status. Filtered to match 'Submitted' status indicating goods in transit.
[FIELD] grand_total | [TABLE] tabDelivery Note | desc: Stores the monetary value of each delivery note. Summed to determine total value of goods in transit.

anchor: Which items have only one vendor?
positives: [TABLE] tabItem Supplier | desc: Links items to their suppliers. Used to identify items with only one supplier.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabItem Supplier | desc: Links each supplier to its parent item. Used to identify items.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabItem Supplier | desc: Identifies the supplier of the item. Counted to check if an item has only one supplier.

anchor: What's the total overtime pay last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabSalary Detail | desc: Stores details of employee salaries including overtime. Used to calculate total overtime pay.
[FIELD] salary_component | [TABLE] tabSalary Detail | desc: Identifies the type of salary component. Filtered to match 'Overtime'.
[FIELD] amount | [TABLE] tabSalary Detail | desc: Represents the amount of each salary component. Summed to calculate total overtime pay.
[FIELD] start_date | [TABLE] tabSalary Detail | desc: Represents the start date of the salary period. Filtered to match 'last month'.
[FIELD] end_date | [TABLE] tabSalary Detail | desc: Represents the end date of the salary period. Filtered to match 'last month'.

anchor: Which items have different prices in different locations?
positives: [TABLE] tabItem Price | desc: Stores item prices for different price lists. Used to identify items with different prices.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabItem Price | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list items with different prices.
[FIELD] price_list | [TABLE] tabItem Price | desc: Represents the price list used. Used to identify different locations.
[FIELD] price_list_rate | [TABLE] tabItem Price | desc: Represents the rate of the item in the price list. Checked for variation to identify items with different prices in different locations.

anchor: What's the stock status for product ABC in our Delhi warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to answer real-time inventory balance and on-hand stock questions.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product being queried. Filtered to match the item mentioned in the question such as 'ABC'.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. This field directly answers how much stock is currently available.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to match the location mentioned in the question such as 'Delhi'.

anchor: Who are the suppliers that have been late with their deliveries in the past quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Records purchase transactions made to suppliers. Used to identify late deliveries.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Links each purchase order to a specific supplier. Used to identify the supplier.
[FIELD] schedule_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the promised delivery date. Used to identify late deliveries.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the actual delivery date. Used to identify late deliveries.

anchor: Which products are running low in our main warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify low stock items.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list the products.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to identify low stock items.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to match the location mentioned in the question such as 'main warehouse'.

anchor: What are the top selling items in the last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Contains individual line items for each sales invoice. Used to retrieve the actual products sold.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Links each item row to its parent sales invoice. Required to apply date filtering from the invoice header.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Identifies the product sold. Used to list or aggregate items sold in the selected period.
[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Represents the quantity sold per item. Summed to calculate total units sold.
[TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Stores sales transaction headers including invoice date and customer information. Used to filter sales by time period such as last month.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Represents the invoice date. Filtered to restrict results to the last month.

anchor: Which items have negative stock in our warehouses?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to identify items with negative stock.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list the products.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to identify items with negative stock.

anchor: What's the stock value of each item in our finished goods warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to calculate stock value.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product. Used to list the products.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. Used to calculate stock value.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Indicates the storage location of the stock. Filtered to match the location mentioned in the question such as 'finished goods warehouse'.
[TABLE] tabItem | desc: Contains item details including price. Used to calculate stock value.
[FIELD] standard_rate | [TABLE] tabItem | desc: Represents the standard price of the item. Used to calculate stock value.

anchor: What returns have we processed this week?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Records sales return transactions. Used to identify returns processed in a specific time period.
[FIELD] return_against | [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Links each return to the original sales invoice. Used to identify the original sale.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabSales Return | desc: Represents the date of the return. Filtered to match the time period mentioned in the question such as 'this week'.

anchor: How many products are pending transfer between our warehouses?
positives: [TABLE] tabStock Entry | desc: Records stock movements between warehouses. Used to identify pending transfers.
[FIELD] purpose | [TABLE] tabStock Entry | desc: Indicates the reason for the stock movement. Filtered to match 'Material Transfer'.
[FIELD] docstatus | [TABLE] tabStock Entry | desc: Represents the status of the document. Filtered to match 'Pending'.

anchor: Which products have the highest sales in the last quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Contains individual line items for each sales invoice. Used to retrieve the actual products sold.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Links each item row to its parent sales invoice. Required to apply date filtering from the invoice header.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Identifies the product sold. Used to list or aggregate items sold in the selected period.
[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Represents the quantity sold per item. Summed to calculate total units sold.
[TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Stores sales transaction headers including invoice date and customer information. Used to filter sales by time period such as last quarter.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Represents the invoice date. Filtered to restrict results to the last quarter.

anchor: What's the net profit for the last financial year?
positives: [TABLE] tabIncome Statement | desc: Contains financial performance data. Used to calculate net profit.
[FIELD] net_profit_loss | [TABLE] tabIncome Statement | desc: Represents the net profit or loss. This field directly answers the net profit question.
[FIELD] fiscal_year | [TABLE] tabIncome Statement | desc: Indicates the financial year. Filtered to match the time period mentioned in the question such as 'last financial year'.
